title: 8-p-Tolyl Sulphonamido-Quinoline as a Chelating Agent in Inorganic Analysis
author: R. C. AGARWAL
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, D. Jain College, Baraut 

  Manuscript received 10 July 1974; accepted 9 October 1974.  

 8- \(p\) -Tolylsulphonamido quinoline has been used as a gravimetric reagent for AI (Ill), Zn(II) and Mg (II) at  \(p\) H 4.5, 5.0 and 9.0 respectively. The AI-complex has 1:3 and Mg and Zn complexes 1:2-metal ligand composition.
steps_raw:
